n8n AI Automation Expert
Posted 38 minutes ago
Worldwide

Summary
We are seeking an AI Automation Expert to enhance our workflow automation using n8n. The ideal candidate will have experience in integrating AI models with n8n and optimizing workflows for efficiency. Responsibilities include designing and implementing AI-driven automation solutions, troubleshooting existing workflows, and collaborating with our team to identify automation opportunities. If you have a passion for AI and automation, we would love to hear from you!

$50.00

Fixed-price
Entry level
I am looking for freelancers with the lowest rates
Project Type:One-time project

Mandatory skills
Adobe Illustrator
Artificial Intelligence
Machine Learning
Natural Language Processing
Python
Automation
n8n
Nice-to-have skills
HTML5
D3.js
